sqlCommand.descr: delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0
insert into TransX (KeyID,Co, GL, Amt1) (Select KeyID + '-data2', Co, GL, Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' )
insert into TransX (KeyID,Co, GL, Amt1) (Select KeyID + '-data3', '2008' as Co, '6818001' as GL, Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and Co like '45%' and not GL like '68%')
insert into TransX (KeyID,Co, GL, Amt1) (Select KeyID + '-data3', '2008' as Co, '6818001' as GL, -Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and Co = '2008' and GL = '6818001')
update TransX set GL = Field1  from TransX inner join Misc_Tables on GL  = Descr where keyID = '[batchID]' and Table_ID = 'InvExpReclass' and ID = 'GL'
update TransX set Co = '2008' where keyID = '[batchID]' and Co <> '1000'
update TransX set Amt1 = -Amt1 where keyID = '[batchID]'
insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Amt1) (Select KeyID, Co, '6818000' as GL, -Amt1 as Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' )
update TransX set GL = '6112000' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '6114001'
insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Amt1) (Select'[batchID]', Co, GL, Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data3' )
insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Amt1) (Select '[batchID]', Co, '6818000' as GL, -Amt1 as Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data3' )
insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Amt1, Flex6) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, 'pass2' as Flex6 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, Co, GL)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (Flex6 is NULL or Amt1 = 0)
update TransX set PK = '40', CC = '5USI000001', Flex6 = '', Txt = 'IFRS Inv Exp Reclass' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set PK = '50' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 < 0
update TransX set CC = '5OHI000000' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '1000'
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID like '[batchID]%'
update TransX set Flex1 = cast(ABS(Amt1) as varchar(255)) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'

update TransX set Ledger = 'IF',PC = '',TP = '',TTY='',ProdCode = '',UWYR = '',AccYr = '',ReinName = '',ReinLoc = '',BusCat = '',Contract = '',CatCode = '',RiskTerr = '',Broker = '',PTF = '',Stat = '',TransCode = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'

sqlSelect.descr: insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Amt1) values ('[batchID]',
